title: rubus montanus var. coarctatus
intro: Rubus montanus var. coarctatus, also known as the Alpine Bramble, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the Rubus genus of flowering plants. The Alpine Bramble has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rubus montanus var. coarctatus include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus montanus var. coarctatus can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
